recent_commits: fad4780 fix: wrap blocking Oracle DB calls in asyncio.to_thread()
a1af2f9 fix: Snowflake param binding dict→tuple in get_tables/get_columns (TODO-434)
dcd977c fix(security): fix JWT RLS race condition in SupabaseProvider — per-connection scoping (TODO-433)
7fe0bc7 ci: add GitHub Actions CI pipeline (lint, test, pip-audit)

score_rationale.revenue_potential: Core data abstraction layer for Signal Studio — enables multi-tier enterprise/self-serve/legacy customers. Direct revenue enabler for ForwardLane's multi-tenant SaaS.
score_rationale.strategic_value: Critical infrastructure: provider pattern cleanly abstracts Snowflake (enterprise), Supabase (self-serve), Oracle (legacy). Includes Cortex AI, pgvector, Oracle 23ai vector search — positions for AI-native analytics.
score_rationale.completeness: Protocol + 3 providers + factory + SQL adapter all functional. But no __init__.py package root, no README with usage examples, no integration tests, no schema_registry implementation (test file exists but no source), no error handling/retry logic, no connection pooling config exposure.
score_rationale.urgency: Security fixes (JWT RLS race condition) already landed. Snowflake param binding fixed. Oracle async fixed. Next priorities: production hardening, missing providers, monitoring.
score_rationale.effort_remaining: Needs schema_registry implementation, integration test harness, retry/circuit-breaker logic, connection pool tuning, observability (metrics/logging), Docker dev setup, and at least 2 more provider candidates (BigQuery, Databricks).
score_rationale.ci_pipeline: GitHub Actions CI exists with lint (ruff), type check (mypy), tests on 3.11+3.12, and pip-audit. No coverage reporting, no integration test stage, audit has || true escape hatch.
score_rationale.test_quality: Good mock-based unit tests covering all 3 providers, factory, SQL adapter. Excellent security regression tests (JWT isolation, SQL injection validation, param binding). Missing: integration tests, edge cases (connection failures, timeouts, large result sets), coverage metrics.

architecture.pattern: Protocol-based provider abstraction with factory routing

production_readiness.item: Add structured logging (not just exceptions) across all providers
Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient DB errors
Add circuit breaker pattern for provider failover
Add connection pool health checks and auto-reconnect
Add query timeout enforcement (max_query_cost exists but isn't enforced)
Add metrics/observability (query latency, error rates, cache hit ratio, Snowflake credits)
Remove || true from pip-audit CI step; establish proper vulnerability baseline
Add Docker Compose dev setup with Postgres for local testing
Add integration test stage in CI with test containers

snowflake_fixes.item: Cortex COMPLETE call uses f-string for model name — potential SQL injection; use parameterized query
TTLCache is not thread-safe — add locking or use cachetools
Add Snowflake credit budget enforcement (max_query_cost config exists but unused)

oracle_fixes.item: vector_search() uses f-string interpolation for column name — SQL injection risk despite _validate_identifier existing
vector_search() passes embedding as string literal — verify Oracle 23ai accepts this format
get_tables() USER_TAB_COMMENTS query doesn't return NUM_ROWS — need join to USER_TABLES
Add Oracle connection pool health monitoring

missing_providers.item: Implement SchemaRegistry (test file exists at tests/test_schema_registry.py but no source)
Generic JDBC/ODBC provider for long-tail databases

supabase_fixes.item: vector_search() doesn't validate table/column before f-string interpolation consistently
Realtime subscribe() is a stub — implement or remove
Add connection pool size configuration exposure (currently hardcoded min=2, max=20)
